data.title: Itaú calls for 1% – 3% Bitcoin positioning in investor portfolios
data.description:
Itaú reiterates a 1%–3% Bitcoin allocation from 2026, citing diversification benefits, currency effects, and disciplined long-term positioning.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/itau-calls-for-1-3-bitcoin-positioning/

data.title: 0G Foundation: Contract attack results in 520,000 0G tokens stolen.
data.description: The 0G Foundation announced on the X platform that a targeted attack compromised its rewards contract on December 11. Attackers exploited the emergency withdrawal function of the 0G rewards contract, used to distribute affiliate rewards, to steal 520,010 $0G tokens, which were subsequently bridged and distributed via Tornado Cash. The attackers also obtained a leaked private key from an Alibaba Cloud instance that managed NFT state and rewards updates and stored the private key locally. Multiple Alibaba Cloud instances were compromised due to a critical vulnerability (CVE-2025-66478) in Next.js that was exploited on December 5. The attackers moved laterally via internal IP addresses, affecting calibration services, validator nodes, Gravity NFT services, node sales services, compute, Aiverse, Perpdex, Ascend, and other services. The confirmed total loss is 520,010 $0G, 9.93 ETH, and 4200 USDT. Apart from the reward distribution contract, neither the core chain infrastructure nor user funds were affected.

data.title: Kazakhstan Integrates Solana into National Blockchain Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Kazakhstan is incorporating Solana as a key infrastructure in its national blockchain strategy, as announced by FORMA Mayor Farhaj Mayan at the Solana Breakpoint conference. The country is implementing several initiatives, including the establishment of a Solana economic zone, the introduction of the Tenge stablecoin, and dual IPO listings on AIX and Solana. Additionally, Kazakhstan plans to train 1,000 Solana developers, create a national crypto asset reserve, and develop a blockchain-centric CryptoCity. These efforts demonstrate Kazakhstan's commitment to embedding blockchain technology deeply into its financial and industrial systems.

data.title: SEC Chairman Announces Shift to On-Chain Financial Markets
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairman Paul Atkins announced on the X platform that the U.S. financial markets are set to transition to on-chain systems. This shift will prioritize innovation and the adoption of new technologies. The SEC has issued a no-action letter to the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTC), allowing DTC participants to directly transfer tokenized securities into registered wallets of other participants. These transactions will be officially recorded and tracked by the DTC, promising greater predictability, transparency, and efficiency for investors.

data.title: Enforcement Directorate files charges against five individuals in $11 million fraud
data.description:

data.title: Coinbase to Collaborate with Kalshi for USDC-Powered Prediction Market
data.description:
Coinbase and Kalshi are set to launch an internal prediction market powered by USDC and safeguarded by Coinbase Custody.
source: https://coincu.com/news/coinbase-kalshi-usdc-prediction-market/

data.title: Backed Finance and Chainlink Launch xBridge to Move Tokenized Stocks Between Solana and Ethereum
data.description:
Backed Finance and Chainlink have unveiled xBridge, a new cross-chain system designed to transfer tokenized stocks, known as xStocks, between the Solana and Ethereum blockchains. The launch on December 12, 2025 marks a significant step in linking traditional financial assets with decentralized markets and is being rolled out initially in a controlled pilot phase.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/backed-finance-and-chainlink-launch-xbridge-to-move-tokenized-stocks-between-solana-and-ethereum/

data.title: From NFTs to Dinosaurs: Crypto Elite Turn to Ultra-Rare Tangible Assets
data.description:
Wintermute’s Yoann Turpin and other crypto investors bought a rare triceratops fossil, signaling a shift from NFTs to ultra-scarce physical assets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/from-nfts-to-dinosaurs-crypto-elite-turn-to-ultra-rare-tangible-assets/

data.title: Crypto Firm Tether Makes Bold $1 Billion Play For Juventus Football Club
data.description:
Tether Holdings announced on Friday that it submitted a binding all-cash proposal to Exor, a Dutch-based global investment holding company controlled by Italy's Agnelli family, to acquire its entire stake in Juventus Football Club. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/news/sports/25/12/49379421/crypto-firm-tether-makes-bold-1-billion-play-for-juventus-football-club?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=referral

data.title: HaLLu: Deep cooperation reached with 4 strategic partners
data.description: HaLLu announced that it has reached in-depth cooperation agreements with four strategic partners. The four parties will conduct comprehensive collaboration on ecosystem building, liquidity support, technology refinement, and community operation to accelerate the project. In addition, HaLLu stated that IDO has entered the final sprint stage; the new bylaws and roadmap for the next stage will also be announced soon.

data.title: UK Lawmakers Urge Revisions to Bank of England's Stablecoin Framework
data.description:
According to PANews, a coalition of UK cross-party lawmakers has addressed a letter to Chancellor Rachel Reeves, urging modifications to the Bank of England's proposed stablecoin framework. The lawmakers expressed concerns that the current draft could stifle innovation and lead to capital flight. They highlighted that the framework's restrictions on the use of stablecoins in wholesale markets, the prohibition of interest on reserves, and a holding cap of £20,000 might diminish London's appeal as a global financial hub, potentially driving investors towards dollar-pegged alternatives.

The letter advocates for the establishment of a forward-looking stablecoin framework to ensure international investment, support the growth of high-value fintech, and reinforce the UK's position as a global innovation center.

data.title: 47 Ronin director blows budget on crypto, accused of wire fraud
data.description:
Carl Erik Rinsch, the popular director of the Hollywood blockbuster 47 Ronin, has been convicted of wire fraud and money laundering.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/47-ronin-director-crypto-accused-wire-fraud/

data.title: Grayscale transferred approximately 14,684 ETH and 252 BTC to Coinbase Prime, worth over $70 million.
data.description: According to data monitored by Arkham, digital asset management company Grayscale once again saw large-scale ETH and BTC transfers last night, transferring approximately 14,684.643 ETH (worth approximately $47 million) and approximately 252.5 BTC (worth approximately $23.28 million) to a Coinbase Prime address.

data.title: Solana Mobile: Partnering with chip manufacturers, plans to integrate hardware kits into over 2 billion Android phones.
data.description: Solana officially announced on the X platform that Solana Mobile is working with chip manufacturers to bring hardware integration kits to over 2 billion Android phones.

data.title: OCC Clears Circle, Ripple and Others to Launch Crypto National Banks
data.description:
The OCC has conditionally approved five crypto firms, including Circle and Ripple, to launch national trust banks.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/occ-clears-circle-ripple-and-others-to-launch-crypto-national-banks/

data.title: Tether Moves to Acquire Majority Stake in Juventus Football Club
data.description:
Tether has submitted an all-cash offer to acquire a 65. 4% stake in Juventus and plans to invest up to €1 billion in the club’s long-term development.
source: https://btcusa.com/tether-moves-to-acquire-majority-stake-in-juventus-football-club/
